national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: AU Precious Metals
buyers.payout_claims: "top dollar" reflecting "the current spot value of gold"; "top market payouts" — no percentage published
buyers.testing_transparency: Non-invasive x-ray fluorescence assay described on site to "determine your items' type, quantity, and purity."
buyers.evidence_notes: Refiner with retail buying counters (Rochester HQ; Royal Oak landing page); names its XRF assay method explicitly — rare among metro buyers. Walk-ins always welcome, private appointments and mail-in also offered; payment by cash, wire, bullion, or check. "Honest evaluations, top payouts, and a pressure-free experience."

buyers.name: Tapper's Gold Exchange
buyers.address: 2800 W Big Beaver Rd, Troy, MI 48084 (Somerset Collection; 8 metro Detroit locations)
buyers.hours: Generally Mon–Sat 10am–6pm; Sunday varies by location
buyers.payout_claims: "110% Price Match Guarantee": matches any written offer from the last 3 days and pays 10% more on the difference; extra 20% bonus applicable to gold jewelry only
buyers.testing_transparency: On-site evaluation by a Graduate Gemologist; equipment/method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Gold-exchange arm of Tapper's jewelers, "state licensed and regulated pawnbroker"; publishes lending fees (3%/month + $3 storage) and a $250/hr estate-evaluation fee over 90 minutes, waived if you sell. Walk-ins welcome, appointments recommended. Price-match terms published with conditions.

buyers.name: Gold City
buyers.address: 23603 John R Rd, Hazel Park, MI 48030
buyers.payout_claims: "competitive pricing" and "top dollar" for sterling and scrap — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No in-house testing method described; references PCGS and NGC third-party grading for coins.
buyers.evidence_notes: Serving greater metro Detroit since 1971 ("two generations of experience built on honesty, transparency, and customer satisfaction"); acts as a refining backend for other dealers ("go-to backend for melt"), plus retail buying of jewelry, sterling, and coins.

buyers.name: Diamond Vault of Troy
buyers.address: 801 W Big Beaver Rd, Suite 103, Troy, MI 48084
buyers.payout_claims: "best market prices for your gold coins" and "competitive pricing" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Evaluates "the weight, purity, and spot price of your gold jewelry to determine its market value accurately" — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Troy jeweler serving Birmingham/greater Detroit; cites "A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau" and claims to be one of the most highly reviewed jewelers in Michigan; free, no-obligation, pressure-free evaluations suggest walk-in service.

buyers.name: Miner's Den Jewelers
buyers.hours: Wed–Fri 10am–6pm (seasonal closure noted at research time)
buyers.payout_claims: "no-obligation quote in just a few minutes" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Royal Oak jeweler buying all precious metals; "We do not require appointments for selling your jewelry/precious metal"; small items evaluated in minutes, larger estates take 24–48 hours; also offers trade-in and upcycling into custom pieces. Limited posted hours at research time (summer vacation notice).

buyers.name: Detroit Jewelry Appraisers
buyers.payout_claims: "The most competitive offers guaranteed" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Ferndale buyer of jewelry, gold, silver, diamonds, and watches with free consultations; we-buy-gold page is thin on process detail — no payout math, testing, or licensing info posted.

buyers.name: Ace Diamond Jewelers
buyers.payout_claims: "We guarantee to pay the highest for your gold, diamonds, and fine jewelry"; "highest cash offers" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "Our experienced appraisers will assess your gold based on its purity (karat rating) and weight" — equipment not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Dearborn jeweler with a dedicated sell-your-gold page; cash on the spot at current market prices, "No Appointment Needed," walk-ins always welcome. Hours not posted on the page.
